jasperReport.name: classic_landscape
jasperReport.queryString: select b.Cmayor as Mayor, b.Cformato as Formato, b.Cdescripcion as DescCuenta, a.Eperiodo as Periodo, a.Emes as Mes, convert(varchar,a.Eperiodo) || '-' || convert(varchar,a.Emes) as PeriodoMes, coalesce(he.Edescripcion,'') as DescEnca, he.Edocumento as Edocumento, coalesce(he.Oorigen,'') as Origen, convert(varchar,he.Efecha,103) as Efecha , hd.Cconcepto as Concepto, hd.Edocumento Poliza, --hd.Dlinea Linea, coalesce(hd.Ddocumento, 'Saldo Inicial') as Documento, coalesce(hd.Dreferencia,'') as Dreferencia, a.montoorigen as MontoOriginal, m.Mnombre as Moneda, coalesce(a.saldoini,0) as SaldoInicial, coalesce(a.debitos,0) as Debitos, coalesce(a.creditos,0) as Creditos, coalesce(a.acumulado, 0) as Acumulado, convert(varchar,getdate(), 103) || ' ' || convert(varchar,getdate(),108) as fecha_hora, o.Odescripcion as Oficina, hd.Dtipocambio as TipoCambio from DCGRBalanzaDetalle a inner join CContables b on b.Ccuenta = a.Ccuenta left outer join Oficinas o on o.Ecodigo = a.Ecodigo and o.Ocodigo = a.Ocodigo left outer join HDContables hd on hd.IDcontable = a.IDcontable and hd.Dlinea = a.Dlinea left outer join HEContables he on he.IDcontable = a.IDcontable left outer join ConceptoContableE c on c.Ecodigo = a.Ecodigo and c.Cconcepto = a.Cconcepto left outer join Monedas m on m.Mcodigo = hd.Mcodigo where a.CGRBDid = $P{CGRBDid} order by b.Cmayor, b.Cformato, a.DCGRBDlinea
